current_state.structure: Single monolithic HTML file (2596 lines) with embedded CSS and JavaScript

identified_bugs.title: localStorage Quota Exceeded Not Handled Gracefully
identified_bugs.description: The app catches QuotaExceededError but only shows a toast. On quota full, subsequent writes silently fail, corrupting data integrity without user awareness.
identified_bugs.impact: Data loss on older devices with limited storage (iOS, Android)
identified_bugs.reproduction: Fill localStorage to ~5MB, attempt to log food entries

identified_bugs.title: Date Key Generation Timezone Issue
identified_bugs.description: getKey() uses local Date object without timezone consideration. Users traveling or in different timezones get date shifts. Daily resets may not align with user intent.
identified_bugs.reproduction: User in EST uses app, travels to PST, logs food - appears under wrong date

identified_bugs.title: Macro Calculation Bug in renderHome()
identified_bugs.description: Line 1802 combines carbs+fat incorrectly for display: `document.getElementById('c-eaten').textContent=Math.round(tot.carbs+tot.fat)` should only show carbs.
identified_bugs.impact: Incorrect carb totals displayed to user
identified_bugs.reproduction: Log food with known carbs/fat, check display vs actual

identified_bugs.title: XSS Vulnerability in sanitizeHTML()
identified_bugs.description: sanitizeHTML() uses textContent which is safe, but custom food entry bypasses proper validation. HTML entities aren't re-escaped in display contexts.
identified_bugs.impact: Potential XSS if attacker can inject via custom food name

identified_bugs.title: Quantity Input Allows Negative/Excessive Values
identified_bugs.description: onQtyInput() at line 1687 checks `v>0` but stepQty() allows 0.5 increments without upper bound. User can input 999+ quantities.
identified_bugs.reproduction: In food quantity modal, type '9999' or decrement below 0.5

issues: Monolithic 2600-line single file - 0 separation of concerns
2 global state variables (profile, targets) with no encapsulation
11 global functions with no module organization
Food database hardcoded in JavaScript - not externalized
No dependency injection or testability hooks
Functions exceed 50 lines: renderHome (52 lines), renderHistory, etc.
No JSDoc or inline comments explaining complex logic
Try-catch only in storage functions, no validation elsewhere
No error recovery for malformed localStorage data
Silent failures in profile load if setup incomplete

security_findings.title: No Input Validation on User Profile
security_findings.description: Age, weight, height validated with basic range checks but no type coercion safety. Could cause BMR calculation errors.

security_findings.title: localStorage Used for Sensitive Fitness Data
security_findings.description: Fitness goals, weight, age stored unencrypted in localStorage. On shared devices, exposing personal health data.

security_findings.title: No CSRF Protection
security_findings.description: No future-proofing for backend integration. Will need CSRF tokens when cloud sync added.

tasks.title: Fix Timezone Date Bug (BUG-002)
tasks.description: Use ISO date string with UTC to prevent timezone shifts

implementation_details.approach: Replace getKey() to use UTC date: const getKey=(d)=>{const dt=d||new Date();const offset=dt.getTimezoneOffset();const localISOTime=new Date(dt.getTime()-offset*60000).toISOString().split('T')[0];return localISOTime;

tasks.title: Fix Carbs Display Bug (BUG-003)
tasks.description: Correct carbs display calculation - remove fat component

implementation_details.approach: Change line 1802 from `tot.carbs+tot.fat` to just `tot.carbs`

tasks.title: Add Quantity Input Validation (BUG-005)
tasks.description: Constrain food quantity to 0.5-99 range

implementation_details.approach: Update stepQty() and onQtyInput() with min/max bounds

tasks.title: Improve localStorage Quota Handling (BUG-001)
tasks.description: Implement fallback mechanism and user notification strategy

implementation_details.approach: Add data compression for history, implement prioritized deletion (delete oldest history entries), warn user at 80% quota
implementation_details.testing: Fill storage to limits, verify graceful degradation

tasks.deliverable: Robust quota management with user options

tasks.title: Enhanced XSS Prevention (BUG-004)
tasks.description: Strengthen input sanitization

implementation_details.approach: Replace sanitizeHTML with DOMPurify-lite or enhance to handle edge cases. Add Content Security Policy meta tag.
implementation_details.testing: Test with special characters, HTML entities, emoji

tasks.title: Add Data Validation Layer
tasks.description: Validate loaded localStorage data before use

implementation_details.approach: Create validateProfile(), validateLog(), validateTargets() functions that verify data types and ranges before use
implementation_details.testing: Corrupt localStorage entries, verify app handles gracefully

tasks.title: Create Manifest & Icons
tasks.description: Proper PWA manifest with app icons and install prompts

implementation_details.approach: Update manifest.json with proper icon sizes (192x192, 512x512), add app name, description, screenshots

tasks.title: Extract Food Database Module
tasks.description: Separate food database from main HTML into JSON file with module wrapper

implementation_details.approach: Create foods.js with ES6 module export. Implement category management as class. Add search/filter utilities.
implementation_details.testing: Verify all 150+ foods load, categories filter correctly

tasks.title: Create Storage Abstraction Layer
tasks.description: Abstract localStorage behind Repository pattern with encryption option

implementation_details.approach: Create StorageRepository class with methods: get/set/delete/clear. Implement compression for history. Support optional encryption hook for future backend.

tasks.title: Extract State Management
tasks.description: Create AppState class to manage profile, targets, logs, weight, fasting

implementation_details.approach: Create state.js with AppState class. Implement getters/setters with validation. Add change event system for UI updates.

tasks.title: Extract UI Components as Functions
tasks.description: Create component module for reusable UI elements

implementation_details.approach: Create components/: MacroRing, FoodItem, StatCard, etc. Each as pure function returning HTML. Implement event binding system.

tasks.title: Extract Calculation Utilities
tasks.description: Create separate math module for BMR, TDEE, macros, calories

implementation_details.approach: Create calculations.js with: calcBMR(), calcTDEE(), calcMacros(), stepsToKcal(). Add unit tests.
implementation_details.testing: Verify against standard formulas (Harris-Benedict, Mifflin-St Jeor)

tasks.title: Create Router Module
tasks.description: Explicit routing system instead of switchTab() global function

implementation_details.approach: Create router.js with Router class. Implement navigation history, state preservation, URL-based routing for mobile web share.

tasks.title: Add Logging & Analytics System
tasks.description: Create structured logging for debugging and analytics

implementation_details.approach: Create logger.js with info/warn/error levels. Store structured logs in IndexedDB (5MB limit). Add error reporting hook for backend.
implementation_details.testing: Verify logs captured, no PII in logs

tasks.title: Add JSDoc & Documentation
tasks.description: Document all public APIs with JSDoc comments

implementation_details.approach: Add JSDoc to all functions, classes, and modules. Generate HTML docs with JSDoc tool.

tasks.title: Setup Jest Testing Framework
tasks.description: Configure Jest with Babel for ES6 support

implementation_details.approach: Install Jest, @babel/preset-env. Create jest.config.js. Configure coverage thresholds.
implementation_details.testing: Verify Jest runs and reports coverage

tasks.title: Unit Tests: Calculations Module
tasks.description: 100% test coverage for BMR, TDEE, macro calculations

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/calculations.test.js. Test: calcBMR (male/female), calcTDEE (all activity levels), calcMacros (all diet ratios), stepsToKcal()
implementation_details.testing: All calculations match known good values

tasks.title: Unit Tests: Storage Module
tasks.description: Test repository pattern implementation

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/storage.test.js. Test: get/set/delete/clear, quota handling, compression, data persistence

tasks.title: Unit Tests: State Management
tasks.description: Test AppState class operations

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/state.test.js. Test: profile updates, log additions/deletions, target calculations, event emissions

tasks.title: Unit Tests: Food Database
tasks.description: Test food search, filtering, categories

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/foods.test.js. Test: search by name, filter by category, nutrition calculations, duplicate checking

tasks.title: Integration Tests: Food Logging Flow
tasks.description: Test end-to-end food logging workflow

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/integration-logging.test.js. Test: select food -> adjust quantity -> log -> verify daily totals update

tasks.title: Integration Tests: Profile Setup
tasks.description: Test profile creation and target calculation

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/integration-profile.test.js. Test: invalid inputs rejected, targets calculated correctly, profile persisted

tasks.title: E2E Tests: Playwright Setup
tasks.description: Configure Playwright for critical user flows

implementation_details.approach: Install @playwright/test. Create playwright.config.js. Test on Chromium, Firefox, WebKit. Add screenshot comparison.
implementation_details.testing: Run tests headless and headed modes

tasks.title: E2E Tests: Core User Flows
tasks.description: Test critical user journeys

implementation_details.approach: Create e2e/workflows.spec.js covering: setup profile -> log breakfast -> check macros -> view history -> update weight -> check fasting timer

phases.name: Cloud Sync & Backend Integration

tasks.title: Choose Backend Service & Setup Auth
tasks.description: Select between Firebase, Supabase, or custom Node.js backend

implementation_details.approach: Comparison matrix: cost, features, learning curve. Recommendation: Supabase for PostgreSQL + real-time sync. Setup authentication with OAuth2.

supabase.pros: PostgreSQL, Row Level Security, real-time, open-source friendly

firebase.pros: Mature, offline support built-in, Google backing

custom.pros: Full control, cost efficient, learning opportunity

tasks.title: Implement Cloud Storage Service
tasks.description: Create abstraction layer for cloud storage operations

implementation_details.approach: Create cloud-storage.js with CloudStorage class. Implement: sync profile, sync daily logs, sync weight history, sync fasting data. Support offline queue.

tasks.title: Setup Sync Conflict Resolution
tasks.description: Implement last-write-wins and merge strategies

implementation_details.approach: Create sync-resolver.js with conflict detection. For logs: merge by meal type. For weight: keep latest. For profile: manual resolution prompt.
implementation_details.testing: Test simultaneous edits from multiple devices

tasks.title: Add Background Sync
tasks.description: Implement Service Worker background sync

implementation_details.approach: Update sw.js with sync event handlers. Create SyncQueue for offline changes. Retry failed syncs with exponential backoff.

tasks.title: Create User Dashboard
tasks.description: Web dashboard for viewing sync status, device management

implementation_details.approach: Create dashboard.html showing: linked devices, last sync time, data backup status, export options. Link account to multiple devices.
features: Device list with last sync time
implementation_details.testing: Verify dashboard loads with cloud data

tasks.title: Implement Data Export/Import
tasks.description: Support exporting and importing full data backup

implementation_details.approach: Create export.js with functions: exportToJSON(), exportToCSV(), importFromJSON(), importFromCSV(). Support bulk operations.

tasks.title: Add Real-time Notifications
tasks.description: Notify user of sync events, conflicts, errors

implementation_details.approach: Extend toast system with: sync-start, sync-success, sync-error, conflict-detected. Add toast queue for multiple messages.

tasks.title: Implement Encryption for Sensitive Data
tasks.description: Optional encryption for cloud storage using TweetNaCl.js

implementation_details.approach: Create encryption.js with encrypt/decrypt functions. Store encryption key in secure storage. Enable per-user settings.
implementation_details.approach_details: Use nacl.secretbox for symmetric encryption. Key derivation from password using scrypt.
implementation_details.testing: Verify encrypted data is unreadable without key

tasks.title: Create API Documentation
tasks.description: Document cloud sync API endpoints and schemas

implementation_details.approach: Create API_SPEC.md documenting all endpoints, request/response schemas, authentication, rate limits, error codes.

tasks.title: Add Cloud Sync Tests
tasks.description: Unit and integration tests for cloud sync

implementation_details.approach: Create __tests__/cloud-sync.test.js. Mock cloud service. Test: sync conflicts, offline queue, retry logic, error handling.
implementation_details.testing: Test with network failures and corruption

success_metrics: Background sync triggers on network restore
Data can be exported in multiple formats

phases.name: Feature Enhancements

tasks.title: Enhanced Food Database with Images
tasks.description: Add food images via USDA/Nutritionix API or Unsplash integration

implementation_details.approach: Integrate FatSecret or USDA FoodData Central API. Cache images locally. Show food photos in search results.
implementation_details.testing: Verify API limits not exceeded, images load

tasks.deliverable: USDA food database integration with images

tasks.title: Advanced Analytics Dashboard
tasks.description: Weekly/monthly trends, macro progression, insights

implementation_details.approach: Create analytics.html with: calories trend chart, macro pie charts, weight trend line, consistency score. Use Chart.js for visualization.
implementation_details.testing: Verify charts update with new data

tasks.title: Social Features - Challenges & Leaderboards
tasks.description: Optional social challenges with friends

implementation_details.approach: Create challenges.js. Implement: 30-day consistency challenge, macro accuracy challenge, weight loss competition. Leaderboard with rankings.

tasks.title: Advanced Fasting Insights
tasks.description: Fasting metrics, autophagy window indicators, health insights

implementation_details.approach: Track fasting windows (12h, 16h, 20h, 24h). Show insulin sensitivity indicators. Provide insights on fasting benefits.

tasks.title: AI-Powered Meal Recommendations
tasks.description: Improve AI suggestions with ML predictions

implementation_details.approach: Integrate OpenAI API or use local model. Based on: remaining macros, food history, preferences, fasting state. Suggest optimal next meal.

tasks.title: Integration with Fitness Trackers
tasks.description: Sync with Apple Health, Google Fit, Fitbit, Oura

implementation_details.approach: Use official APIs to pull steps, heart rate, sleep data. Display in context with nutrition.

tasks.title: Customizable Meal Templates
tasks.description: Save and reuse favorite meal combinations

implementation_details.approach: Create templates.js. Allow users to save multi-food meals as templates. Implement template library with search.
implementation_details.testing: Verify templates apply all foods correctly

tasks.title: Voice Input & Smart Recognition
tasks.description: Log food by voice commands

implementation_details.approach: Use Web Speech API. Implement: 'Log 150g chicken', 'Add 2 cups rice'. Train custom model for food recognition.

tasks.title: Smart Notifications & Reminders
tasks.description: Contextual notifications based on goals and patterns

implementation_details.approach: Implement push notifications. Remind user: lunch time, logging consistency, approaching goals, hydration time.
implementation_details.testing: Verify notifications fire at correct times

tasks.title: Dark/Light Theme Toggle with System Preference
tasks.description: Enhanced theme system with persistence

implementation_details.approach: Detect system theme preference. Allow manual override. Add accent color picker. Persist preference.

success_metrics: Voice logging works for common foods
AI meal suggestions match user macros

tier_1_critical.reason: Data integrity issue affecting cross-timezone users
Enables all future work without regressions

risks_and_mitigations.risk: localStorage quota exceeded during migration to cloud
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Implement automatic history compression, give user option to clear old data before cloud migration
Implement comprehensive sync conflict tests before Phase 4, use feature flags for gradual rollout

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Breaking changes in public APIs during modularity refactor
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Add comprehensive test coverage first (Phase 3), use deprecation warnings for 2 releases

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Third-party API rate limits (USDA, Fitbit, OpenAI)
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Implement caching, queuing, and user quotas. Use fallback to local database if API unavailable

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Timezone data corruption from legacy dates
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Create data migration utility to fix existing dates, add validation checks

immediate: 2. Set up version control and CI/CD
